name: random_40_2020_2025_v2
description: 40 open-source CVEs stratified by year (2020-2025) and CVSS severity. Seed=20260428. Validation sample for Action E + cleanup; excludes both random_200 and random_200_2020_2025.

Linux kernel netfilter nft_set_rbtree vulnerability. In the Linux kernel's netfilter component, rbtree lazy garbage collection on insert might collect an end interval element that has been just added
